title: Cassida lateriflora
taxonomy: Cassida lateriflora is classified within the family Chrysomelidae, which consists of leaf beetles, and more specifically within the subfamily Cassidinae, commonly known as tortoise beetles. These beetles are primarily herbivorous and are known for their distinctive rounded bodies and shell-like covers. Cassida lateriflora is further categorized as a genus within the tribe Cassidini, which consists of various tortoise beetle species. The classification of Cassida lateriflora also places it within the order Coleoptera, a group that encompasses beetles. This comprehensive classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the Cassida lateriflora species.
